subject: A human pirate captain in a blue naval coat and tricorn hat, sword raised mid-command on the deck of a sailing ship
description: A confident pirate captain stands on the deck of a tall ship, body angled forward, sword lifted in one hand as if calling a charge or rallying the crew. He wears a long deep-blue naval coat with gold trim, a wide tricorn hat, and a high collar; a brass spyglass hangs at his hip. His face is set in fierce determination, dark hair tied back. Behind him the rigging and a curve of the wooden hull are visible against an open ocean and a clear, bright blue sky. The whole image is rendered in a dominant blue palette — coat, sea, sky — punctuated by warm wood tones and gold accents. Lighting is bright daylight with a heroic, slightly upward camera angle.
foreground: pirate captain in blue coat and tricorn hat, sword raised, spyglass at hip, on a wooden ship deck
background: ship rigging, wooden hull, open ocean, bright blue sky
